title: VideoChat3: Fully Open Video MLLM for Efficient and Generalist Video Understanding
innovation_summary: VideoChat3: Fully Open Video MLLM for Efficient and Generalist Video Understanding: For effectiveness, we develop a scalable video data synthesis pipeline that curates three diverse, high-quality training datasets: VideoChat3-Academic2M, VideoChat3-LV116K, and VideoChat3-OL617K, covering general, long-form, and streaming.
